name: kellymears
description: Plugin marketplace — git workflows, research, writing, browser automation, and more.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills — commit curation, PR creation, issue filing, and context switching.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Deep-dive research across any domain with multi-source analysis and cited evidence.

plugins.name: comms
plugins.description: Draft human-facing communications in the user's authentic voice.

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Browser automation for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction.

plugins.name: sim
plugins.description: Coding challenge simulators — progressive assessments and live pair programming problems.

plugins.name: sprint-worker
plugins.description: Batch-process GitHub issues using parallel agents.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Red-green-refactor TDD cycle — write a failing test, make it pass, clean up.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Create documents in an Obsidian vault with configurable vault path.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline — context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress.

plugins.name: cli
plugins.description: CLI design best practices — argument design, help text, output formatting, error handling, configuration, and robustness.

plugins.name: ink
plugins.description: Best practices for building terminal UIs with Ink (React for CLIs).

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Code quality hooks — auto-formatting, linting, file protection, context recovery, and subagent orientation.

plugins.name: gist
plugins.description: Create, list, view, edit, and delete GitHub gists. Private by default.

plugins.name: styles
plugins.description: Kaomoji expressions, typed admonitions, and structured response formatting.
